for d in 29; do
  f="articles/2025/12/$d/articles.jsonl"
  [ -f "$f" ] && grep -ohiE "[A-Za-z ]+ [0-9]+-[0-9]+ [A-Za-z ]+" "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "Morocco|Zambia|Comoros|Mali|Angola|Egypt|Zimbabwe|South Africa" | sed 's/^ *//;s/ *$//' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -15
done
echo "=== any breaking: Chelsea/Ukraine/Venezuela/skier/measles Dec 28-29 ==="
for d in 28 29; do
  f="articles/2025/12/$d/articles.jsonl"
  [ -f "$f" ] && grep -ohE '"title":"[^"]*"' "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "chelsea|maresca|ukraine|defence|venezuela|maduro|skier|schwarz|measles|oreshnik" | head -15
done
